recent_announcements.summary: Pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligationsand Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we hereby inform you that the Managementof our Company will be hosting a Conference Call on Monday, 3rd August, 2026, at 17:00 hrsIndia Time to discuss Q1 FY 2026-27 Financial Results of the Company. The Conference Callis in the nature of a group call. We are enclosing herewith the invitation to the conference call for reference. |SUBJECT: Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. Call Updates
